title: Containers on Amazon ECS with Mama J
summary: AWS Developers video explaining containers, Docker, and Amazon ECS as a container orchestration platform. Covers the "it works on my machine" problem, Docker image building, ECS orchestration, Fargate vs EC2 deployment options, and includes a shopping app example with auto-scaling for Black Friday scenarios.
writeup: This AWS Developers video walks through containers on Amazon ECS, starting with the "it works on my machine" problem that containerization solves by packaging code and dependencies into portable Docker images. It positions ECS as the orchestration layer and compares two deployment options: Fargate, the serverless model, and EC2. A shopping app example illustrates auto-scaling for demand spikes such as Black Friday. Takeaways cover Docker image building, how ECS orchestrates containers, and the tradeoff between Fargate and EC2.
